title: Greek Fluffy Cheese Fritters
description: A crispy, savory snack filled with fluffy feta cheese. Perfect for a quick bite or appetizer.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine fluffy feta cheese, crumbled cheese, flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and black pepper.
In a separate bowl, whisk the egg and milk until well combined.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Add the melted butter to the dough and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the batter into the preheated oil.
Fry the fritters for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Remove the fritters from the oil and place on paper towels to drain excess oil.
